title: Protagonist: You — Comic Book Creator
subtitle: Create personalized comic books with you as the hero using LLMs and diffusion models
vision:
What if you could snap a selfie and become the hero of your own comic book?

This project combines **vision models**, **large language models**, and **diffusion-based image generation** to create personalized comic books — panel by panel. You provide a photo (or a description), choose a genre, and an AI agent writes an interactive story while generating comic-style artwork for each scene.

The pipeline demonstrates how multiple AI modalities work together:
- A **vision model** analyzes your photo to create a detailed character sheet
- An **LLM with structured tools** drives the narrative, calling scene-setting, character introduction, and action-sequence tools
- A **diffusion model** (FLUX.1-dev) renders each panel from the tool outputs
- A **prompt engineering strategy** maintains visual consistency across panels without fine-tuning

The result is a multi-panel comic page starring *you*, generated entirely by AI.
learning_outcomes: Build end-to-end multimodal pipelines combining text, image understanding, and image generation
Use structured tool calling with LLMs to drive complex creative workflows
Apply prompt engineering techniques for visual consistency in diffusion models
Work with LLM and image generation APIs to build end-to-end pipelines
Design agentic systems that coordinate multiple AI capabilities
architecture_mermaid:
flowchart LR
    subgraph userInput [User Input]
        Photo["Photo (optional)"]
        Genre["Genre choice"]
        Choices["Story choices"]
    end
    subgraph llm [LLM]
        Story["Story Generation\n(LLM)"]
    end
    subgraph tools [Structured Tools]
        SetScene["set_scene"]
        Character["introduce_character"]
        Action["action_sequence"]
    end
    subgraph imageGen [Image Generation]
        PromptBuilder["Panel Prompt\nBuilder"]
        Flux["FLUX.1-dev"]
    end
    subgraph output [Output]
        PanelGrid["Comic Page\n(HTML Grid)"]
    end
    Photo --> Story
    Genre --> Story
    Choices --> Story
    Story --> tools
    tools --> PromptBuilder
    PromptBuilder --> Flux
    Flux --> PanelGrid
setup_instructions:
```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone <repo-url>
cd comic-agent

# Install dependencies
uv sync

# Set up environment variables
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your LLM_API_KEY and IMAGE_API_KEY

# Run the CLI agent
uv run python agent.py --genre sci-fi

# Or launch the web UI
uv run python app.py
```
challenges: Add character consistency using FLUX.1-Kontext-dev (requires Replicate or self-hosting)
Implement speech bubble rendering directly on generated panel images
Build a panel layout composer that arranges panels in different comic page formats
Add panel-to-panel pose chaining for more dynamic action sequences
Create a style transfer mode that matches different comic art styles (manga, Western, graphic novel)
